event_description: Suspect Greg Schardt acquired a Dell CPi laptop and configured it with a wireless PCMCIA card and homemade antenna for wireless reconnaissance.
Presence of NetStumbler executable in the Recycle Bin indicates the tool was staged on the system for wireless network discovery.
Suspect established communication channels via IRC networks including Undernet and EFnet to participate in hacking-related discussions.
Suspect utilized email accounts mrevilrulez@yahoo.com and whoknowsme@sbcglobal.net for communication and potential identity management.
System telemetry recorded connections to Microsoft services login.passport.com and mobile.msn.com, consistent with standard OS network activity.
